caption: The video features an individual standing at a podium, delivering a speech. The person is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white vest over a light-colored kurta. They are positioned in front of a dark, textured backdrop with a geometric pattern. To the right of the speaker, there is a tall, slender decorative piece with red flowers at its base. The speaker gestures with their hands while speaking into two microphones attached to the podium, indicating an official or formal event. The setting suggests a significant occasion, possibly a political or cultural address.
